resources.string: test Location is a development debugging tool for location-related features.
Language changed. Please restart the app.

Welcome to test Location!

Before using this app, please read and agree to the User Agreement and Privacy Policy.

By continuing to use, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the above terms.

Please follow these steps:

1. Open Settings → About Phone
2. Tap Build Number 7 times to enable Developer Options
3. Go back to Settings → Developer Options
4. Find "Select mock location app"
5. Select "test Location"
Please enter coordinates or tap on map
Your free trial has expired. Please subscribe to continue.

Your free trial has expired. Please subscribe to continue.

Monthly: ¥19.8/month
Yearly: ¥168/year
Location permission is required for mock location

Welcome to test Location!

We highly value your personal information. Your trust is very important to us. We strictly follow laws and regulations to protect the security of your personal information.

If you have any questions, opinions or suggestions about this policy, please contact us at aiai720@gmail.com.

test Location User Agreement

Welcome to test Location!

To use test Location software ("the Software"), you should read and comply with the test Location User Agreement between you and the test Location developer.

Contact email: aiai720@gmail.com

I. Definition
test Location is a development debugging tool APP that helps developers with software development, function debugging, application compatibility testing and other location-related features.

II. Usage Rules
You should comply with relevant laws and regulations and shall not use this software for illegal activities.

III. Disclaimer
This software is for development and testing purposes only. Users should bear all consequences arising from the use of this software.
Member activated. Thank you for your support!
Please set this app as mock location app in Developer Options
